title: PRAGMA reverse_unordered_selects causes schema parse to fail
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, name String, age Nullable(UInt32), created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
INSERT INTO test_table (name, age) VALUES ('Bob', NULL);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE age IS NULL;
key_bug_features: PRAGMA reverse_unordered_selects causes schema parse failure
